message:
fix: add sub_jaxprs field to Equation structs and extend primitive arity coverage

The Equation struct gained a new `sub_jaxprs` field (Vec<Jaxpr>) to support
control-flow and higher-order primitives. Every hand-constructed Equation
in tests, benchmarks, fuzz targets, and proptest strategies needed updating.

Source code changes:
- crates/fj-conformance/fuzz/fuzz_targets/common.rs: extend primitive_arity()
  to cover new bitwise ops (BitwiseAnd/Or/Xor, ShiftLeft/ShiftRight as binary),
  BitwiseNot/ReduceWindow/PopulationCount/CountLeadingZeros as unary, and
  add placeholder arities for DynamicUpdateSlice/OneHot/Cumsum/Cumprod/Sort/
  Argsort/Conv/Cond/Scan/While
- crates/fj-core/src/proptest_strategies.rs: add PopulationCount and
  CountLeadingZeros to arb_primitive(); add sub_jaxprs: vec![] to
  arb_binary_jaxpr() and fingerprint test helpers
- crates/fj-conformance/tests/*.rs: add sub_jaxprs: vec![] to all 18+
  Equation construction sites across cache_keying_oracle, dispatch_ad_oracle,
  e2e, e2e_p2c003, golden_journeys, ir_core_oracle, pe_staging_oracle
- crates/fj-dispatch/benches/dispatch_baseline.rs: add sub_jaxprs field
- crates/fj-dispatch/tests/dispatch_p2c004_suite.rs: add sub_jaxprs field
- crates/fj-interpreters/benches/pe_baseline.rs: add sub_jaxprs field to
  both build_chain_jaxpr and make_neg_mul_jaxpr helpers
- crates/fj-interpreters/src/lib.rs: add sub_jaxprs field to 3 test Equations

Test artifact refreshes (timestamp/duration updates from re-running test suite):
- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json: updated run_id,
  timestamps, and finished_at for latest synthetic CI run
- 26 artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json: refreshed ts_utc_unix_ms timestamps; dispatch
  under load test also shows improved latency percentiles (p50: 16200->15830ns,
  p95: 25358->19446ns, p99: 34916->27782ns)
- 8 artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/*.golden.json: refreshed timestamps
- 32 artifacts/testing/logs/fj-core/*.json: refreshed timestamps and durations
- 31 artifacts/testing/logs/fj-interpreters/*.json: refreshed timestamps/durations
- 16 artifacts/testing/logs/fj-trace/*.json: refreshed timestamps and durations
- 1 new artifact: fj_trace__tests__infer_one_hot_appends_num_classes_dim.json
  for the new OneHot shape inference test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -184,7 +184,9 @@ pub fn primitive_arity(primitive: Primitive) -> usize {
         | Primitive::Pow | Primitive::Div | Primitive::Rem | Primitive::Atan2
         | Primitive::Dot | Primitive::Gather
         | Primitive::Eq | Primitive::Ne | Primitive::Lt | Primitive::Le
-        | Primitive::Gt | Primitive::Ge | Primitive::Concatenate | Primitive::Pad => 2,
+        | Primitive::Gt | Primitive::Ge | Primitive::Concatenate | Primitive::Pad
+        | Primitive::BitwiseAnd | Primitive::BitwiseOr | Primitive::BitwiseXor
+        | Primitive::ShiftLeft | Primitive::ShiftRight => 2,
         // Ternary ops
         Primitive::Select | Primitive::Scatter | Primitive::Clamp => 3,
         // Unary ops
@@ -197,9 +199,14 @@ pub fn primitive_arity(primitive: Primitive) -> usize {
         | Primitive::Reciprocal | Primitive::Logistic | Primitive::Erf | Primitive::Erfc
         | Primitive::ReduceSum | Primitive::ReduceMax | Primitive::ReduceMin | Primitive::ReduceProd
         | Primitive::Reshape | Primitive::Slice | Primitive::Transpose
-        | Primitive::BroadcastInDim | Primitive::DynamicSlice => 1,
+        | Primitive::BroadcastInDim | Primitive::DynamicSlice | Primitive::BitwiseNot | Primitive::ReduceWindow
+        | Primitive::PopulationCount | Primitive::CountLeadingZeros => 1,
         // Nullary ops
         Primitive::Iota => 0,
+        // Other primitives with variable or unspecified arity
+        Primitive::DynamicUpdateSlice | Primitive::OneHot | Primitive::Cumsum | Primitive::Cumprod
+        | Primitive::Sort | Primitive::Argsort | Primitive::Conv | Primitive::Cond
+        | Primitive::Scan | Primitive::While => 1, // Default placeholder
     }
 }
